content.body: @room our meeting today seems to be in https://meet.goto.com/ETSICYBER/craconsumeriotverticals
We’re thinking to have a drafting session on isolation either Friday or Tuesday, at our normal time of 4 PM Paris time. Any preference?
Friday this week or Tuesday next week

This is to determine how to write requirements which get at the properties which browsers currently meet through sandboxing and process isolation. [Sylvestre](https://matrix.to/#/@sylvestre:mozilla.org) and [freddy](https://matrix.to/#/@fbraun:mozilla.org)have previously noted that our requirements were too limiting, so if one of them (or Gcp) could attend, it would be really great.
